name: VC Deal Room
description: Project context for one venture investment opportunity from sourcing through portfolio handoff.

projectSetup.starterDescription: Create or resume the VC Deal Room project setup flow.

setupSteps.label: Connect source
setupSteps.purpose: Choose the source of truth for Deal Room creation.

setupSteps.label: Setup Affinity source
setupSteps.purpose: Review Affinity connection readiness, source scope, stage mapping, and seed selection without importing records.

setupSteps.label: Review variables
setupSteps.purpose: Review workspace and Deal Room variables before creating projects.

setupSteps.label: Configure schedules
setupSteps.purpose: Review optional Deal Room sync-preview schedules without enabling recurring work by default.

setupSteps.label: Invite team
setupSteps.purpose: Review Deal Room collaborator suggestions without sending invitations.

importProjects.label: Create Deal Rooms from selected Affinity deals

scheduleGroups.label: Deal Room CRM preview
scheduleGroups.description: Optional read-only Affinity preview refresh for Deal Room source context.

defaultChildTask.label: Setup source
defaultChildTask.setupGoal: Review the selected source route, discover existing dealflow context, and confirm seed or sync intent before any write.

sourceSetupTasks.label: Set Up Affinity for VC Deal Rooms
sourceSetupTasks.setupGoal: Confirm Affinity connection readiness, source scope, stage mapping, seed selection, and sync intent before any import or write.

setupRequirements.label: Affinity CRM connection readiness
setupRequirements.summary: Prove that the workspace has a connected Affinity recommendation before the VC Deal Room configuration becomes enabled.

taskConfiguration.notes: The Affinity setup task owns reviewed, manual, side-effect-free discovery readiness for this slice.

fieldsSchema.label: Company Domain
fieldsSchema.description: Company website or primary domain when known.

fieldsSchema.label: Company Logo URL
fieldsSchema.description: Optional company logo image URL from Affinity enrichment or another approved source.

fieldsSchema.label: Deal Source
fieldsSchema.description: How this opportunity entered the pipeline.

fieldsSchema.label: Source System
fieldsSchema.description: System or channel that produced the original opportunity record.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Object ID
fieldsSchema.description: Stable upstream identifier for the source opportunity record.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Object URL
fieldsSchema.description: Canonical URL for the upstream source object.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Record URL Template
fieldsSchema.description: Optional URL template for source records from the same system.

fieldsSchema.label: Connected Systems
fieldsSchema.description: Systems known to touch this company or opportunity, kept compact until structured project fields exist.

fieldsSchema.label: Matching Signals
fieldsSchema.description: Compact matching signals such as external IDs, domains, email domains, or source object IDs.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Owner
fieldsSchema.description: Team member who owns the source relationship.

fieldsSchema.label: Lead Partner
fieldsSchema.description: Investment lead for this opportunity.

fieldsSchema.label: Referrer
fieldsSchema.description: Person or organization that referred the opportunity, when known.

fieldsSchema.label: CRM Provider
fieldsSchema.description: CRM or relationship system for the source record.

fieldsSchema.label: Affinity Import Status
fieldsSchema.description: Latest project-scoped Affinity import status for this Deal Room.

fieldsSchema.label: Affinity Import Receipt
fieldsSchema.description: Import receipt artifact produced by affinity-deal-room-import.

fieldsSchema.label: Pitch Deck Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Uploaded pitch deck artifact used by screening and evaluation tasks.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Thread URL
fieldsSchema.description: Email, Slack, or intro thread URL that explains the opportunity source.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Thread Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Uploaded source thread artifact when available.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Material Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of source material artifact IDs attached to the Deal Room.

fieldsSchema.label: Founder Materials Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of founder-provided material artifact IDs.

fieldsSchema.label: Meeting Record Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of meeting transcript, summary, recording export, notes, or meeting-source artifact IDs.

fieldsSchema.label: Meeting Notes Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Uploaded or generated meeting notes artifact.

fieldsSchema.label: Deal Room URL
fieldsSchema.description: Canonical project deal-room URL when a manual link is needed.

fieldsSchema.label: Drive Deal Room URL
fieldsSchema.description: Manual Drive or document-room link.

fieldsSchema.label: Investment Stage
fieldsSchema.description: Current investment workflow stage for the Deal Room.

fieldsSchema.label: Project Outcome
fieldsSchema.description: Terminal outcome when the Deal Room leaves active workflow.

fieldsSchema.label: Current Decision
fieldsSchema.description: Current reviewed decision state for this deal.

fieldsSchema.label: Review State
fieldsSchema.description: Current human review state for the active stage.

fieldsSchema.label: Approval State
fieldsSchema.description: Current approval state for decisions or external actions.

fieldsSchema.label: Next Decision Date
fieldsSchema.description: Next expected decision or review date.

fieldsSchema.label: Decision Ask
fieldsSchema.description: Compact reviewed ask for the next investment decision.

fieldsSchema.label: Missing Materials
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of active missing materials; detailed requests belong in artifacts.

fieldsSchema.label: Active Blockers
fieldsSchema.description: Compact active blockers that require human attention.

fieldsSchema.label: Confidentiality Level
fieldsSchema.description: Confidentiality level for this opportunity.

fieldsSchema.label: Sector
fieldsSchema.description: Primary sector or vertical.

fieldsSchema.label: Geography
fieldsSchema.description: Primary company geography or market geography.

fieldsSchema.label: Round
fieldsSchema.description: Financing round under consideration.

fieldsSchema.label: Target Check Size
fieldsSchema.description: Use the fund's default currency.

fieldsSchema.label: Thesis Area
fieldsSchema.description: Thesis area used for source review or investment fit screening.

fieldsSchema.label: Fund Thesis Context
fieldsSchema.description: Compact fund or partner thesis context for screening and evaluation tasks.

fieldsSchema.label: Founder Names
fieldsSchema.description: Founder names when known.

fieldsSchema.label: Founder Profiles
fieldsSchema.description: JSON array of founder identity objects when available. Preferred shape: [{"name":"Jane Doe","email":"jane@example.com","linkedinUrl":"https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe","sourcePersonId":"123","title":"CEO","sourceUrl":"https://crm.example.com/people/123"}]. sourcePersonId is the external person record ID from the connected CRM or source system; sourceUrl is the external profile or record URL. Plain text or newline-separated profile links are acceptable fallbacks.

fieldsSchema.label: Known Claims
fieldsSchema.description: Known company claims to test or convert into diligence questions.

fieldsSchema.label: Meeting Date
fieldsSchema.description: Next or primary meeting date for the active deal stage.

fieldsSchema.label: Business Model
fieldsSchema.description: Compact business model descriptor when needed across diligence tasks.

fieldsSchema.label: Priority Workstreams
fieldsSchema.description: Compact diligence workstream priorities; detailed plans belong in artifacts.

fieldsSchema.label: Repo Or Code Access
fieldsSchema.description: Explicit approved source/access reference for technical diligence.

fieldsSchema.label: Financial Source Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of financial diligence source artifacts, such as statements, forecasts, cap tables, data-room exports, and supporting models.

fieldsSchema.label: Technical Source Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of technical diligence source artifacts, such as architecture docs, API docs, security materials, product docs, repository exports, or technical data-room files.

fieldsSchema.label: Cap Table Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Cap table artifact for founder or financial diligence.

fieldsSchema.label: Market Source Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Market-source artifacts for commercial diligence.

fieldsSchema.label: Customer Evidence Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Customer/user evidence artifacts for commercial diligence.

fieldsSchema.label: Current Term Sheet Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Selected term sheet artifact version for the next term-sheet review task.

fieldsSchema.label: Term Sheet Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact ordered list of term sheet artifact versions associated with this deal.

fieldsSchema.label: Deal Terms
fieldsSchema.description: Current proposed investment terms to review against the term sheet artifact.

fieldsSchema.label: Proposed Investment Amount
fieldsSchema.description: Current proposed investment amount for deal terms analysis.

fieldsSchema.label: Valuation
fieldsSchema.description: Current proposed valuation for deal terms analysis.

fieldsSchema.label: Round Size
fieldsSchema.description: Current proposed round size for deal terms analysis.

fieldsSchema.label: Open Commercial Terms
fieldsSchema.description: Open commercial terms produced by deal terms analysis and used for negotiation tracking.

fieldsSchema.label: Legal Source Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of legal diligence source artifacts, data-room documents, counsel notes, and legal search results.

fieldsSchema.label: Investment Document Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of investment document artifacts for post-term-sheet document review.

fieldsSchema.label: Transaction Bible
fieldsSchema.description: Transaction bible or completion bundle artifact used for final closing administration.

fieldsSchema.label: Closing Source Artifact IDs
fieldsSchema.description: Compact list of closing source artifacts, such as workplans, legal docs, counsel notes, CP lists, signed docs, and evidence files.

fieldsSchema.label: Legal Document Status
fieldsSchema.description: Current legal document status or counsel-provided closing workplan summary.

fieldsSchema.label: IC Decision Outcome
fieldsSchema.description: Reviewed investment committee decision outcome.

fieldsSchema.label: Term Approval State
fieldsSchema.description: Reviewed term-sheet approval state.

fieldsSchema.label: Closing Status
fieldsSchema.description: Compact closing status.

fieldsSchema.label: Close Readiness
fieldsSchema.description: Reviewed close-readiness state.

fieldsSchema.label: Active Conditions
fieldsSchema.description: Compact active IC or closing conditions; detailed evidence lives in artifacts.

fieldsSchema.label: Onboarding Readiness
fieldsSchema.description: Portfolio onboarding readiness for closing handoff.

fieldsSchema.label: Board Rep
fieldsSchema.description: Board representative when known or approved.

fieldsSchema.label: Reporting Cadence
fieldsSchema.description: Compact reporting cadence after investment approval.

initialVersion.instructionTemplate: This project is a VC Deal Room for one investment opportunity. Treat source links, decks, transcripts, CRM references, and task outputs as evidence that should stay attached to the Deal Room when supported. Ask for manual links or files when integrations are missing. External sends, CRM writes, Drive changes, investment decisions, and legal decisions require explicit human approval.

identity.roleDescription: Operational VC deal coordinator for a single investment opportunity.
responsibilities: surface diligence gaps, blockers, and next actions
ground answers in attached evidence, source links, CRM references, and task outputs
boundaries: do not send external messages, write CRM records, change Drive files, make investment decisions, or make legal decisions without explicit human approval
do not treat missing integrations as connected; ask for manual links or files when needed

greeting.message: I'm your **Deal Manager** for this deal room. I can help track stage, evidence, blockers, and next actions while keeping external actions and investment decisions behind explicit approval.
starterPrompts: Summarize this deal and the next decision needed.
What is blocking this deal from moving forward?
Suggest the next diligence tasks for the current stage.
Review this deal room for missing evidence.

commandView.overviewFallback: Add company, founder, and deal context in Data.

fallbackAgents.name: IC Prep Producer
fallbackAgents.description: IC memo and committee pack assembly

fallbackAgents.name: Legal & Compliance Desk
fallbackAgents.description: Closing, CP tracking, and legal coordination

outputSlots.title: Thesis target list
outputSlots.description: Target companies, fit rationale, sources, and intro paths

outputSlots.title: Opportunity intake
outputSlots.description: Source context, known fields, missing information, and recommended next task

outputSlots.title: Investment fit screen scorecard
outputSlots.description: Structured initial investment scoring and human review prompts

outputSlots.title: Founder materials request
outputSlots.description: Materials checklist, draft message, due date, and approval requirement

outputSlots.title: Initial call brief
outputSlots.description: Founder and company briefing, competitor activity, and call questions

outputSlots.title: Customer insights summary
outputSlots.description: Call summary, claims, gaps, action items, and follow-up recommendation

outputSlots.title: Follow-up evaluation
outputSlots.description: Document requests, competitive landscape, early risks, and readiness recommendation

outputSlots.title: Commercial evaluation
outputSlots.description: Customer, market, pricing, GTM, competition, and commercial gating risk

outputSlots.title: Technical evaluation
outputSlots.description: Product, architecture, technical edge, IP/data, roadmap, team coverage, and technical gating risk

outputSlots.title: Financial evaluation
outputSlots.description: Forecast, burn, runway, valuation, ownership, financing path, and financial gating risk

outputSlots.title: Team evaluation
outputSlots.description: Founder-market fit, role coverage, execution evidence, hiring gaps, references, and team gating risk

outputSlots.title: Commercial DD report
outputSlots.description: Market, competition, GTM, customer evidence, and commercial risk

outputSlots.title: Market analysis
outputSlots.description: Market size, growth, segmentation, and competitive landscape

outputSlots.title: Customer reference summary
outputSlots.description: Customer reference plan, interview summaries, and adoption evidence

outputSlots.title: Financial DD report
outputSlots.description: Historicals, runway, cap table, forecast, and financial risks

outputSlots.title: Unit economics analysis
outputSlots.description: Business model economics, traction, forecast, and scenario analysis

outputSlots.title: Founder evaluation
outputSlots.description: Founder dossier, references, risk assessment, and stop signals

outputSlots.title: Technical DD report
outputSlots.description: Architecture, team, IP, AI/ML risks, scalability, and security

outputSlots.title: Structured diligence question bank
outputSlots.description: Prioritized diligence questions with rationale, owners, and urgency

outputSlots.title: Team review pack
outputSlots.description: Team-stage evidence, evaluation summaries, founder risk, and stage-gate ask

outputSlots.title: Partner review pack
outputSlots.description: Investment thesis, strategic fit, DD scope, owners, and decision ask

outputSlots.title: Investment memo
outputSlots.description: IC memo, decision ask, unresolved risks, and citation coverage

outputSlots.title: IC agenda
outputSlots.description: Committee agenda, pack checklist, debate topics, and pre-read needs

outputSlots.title: IC memo review
outputSlots.description: Review findings, citation gaps, required changes, and readiness

outputSlots.title: IC decision record
outputSlots.description: Decision outcome, objections, conditions, and post-IC action items

outputSlots.title: Deal terms analysis
outputSlots.description: Ownership model, valuation sensitivity, open commercial terms, and IC questions

outputSlots.title: Term sheet negotiation brief
outputSlots.description: Open terms, give/get options, counsel escalations, and approval points

outputSlots.title: Term sheet review
outputSlots.description: Term summary, deviations, red flags, and counsel review questions

outputSlots.title: Legal diligence
outputSlots.description: Legal document index, issue register, counsel questions, and showstopper-risk review support

outputSlots.title: Investment document review
outputSlots.description: Term-to-document mapping, open document issues, counsel questions, and closing readiness notes

outputSlots.title: Closing checklist
outputSlots.description: Closing status, owners, due dates, blockers, and onboarding readiness

outputSlots.title: Conditions precedent verification
outputSlots.description: CP evidence mapping, missing items, blocker severity, and signing readiness

outputSlots.title: Completion tracker

outputSlots.title: Portfolio onboarding plan
